prompt: A warm, whimsical digital illustration of a cozy sunlit art studio showing a friendly collaboration between a cute blue water-drop mascot and cheerful white-and-teal robots. In the foreground, a large wooden worktable is covered with art supplies and finished sketches: exactly 3 paintbrush cups, multiple pencils and pens, watercolor palettes, small paint jars, loose character drawings, and 2 digital drawing tablets. At the center of the table, one large horizontal pen-display tablet shows a colorful pastel illustration in progress. The blue droplet character, with glossy rounded body, tiny arms, rosy cheeks, and a happy open smile, sits on the left holding a paintbrush and giving a high-five to a humanoid robot seated on the right. The robot has a smooth white body with teal glowing accents, a dark face screen with bright cyan smiling eyes, and one hand touching the tablet while the other meets the mascot’s hand, with small celebratory spark lines around the high-five. In the midground on the right, exactly 2 more robots are visible: one seated beside a human artist and one partially visible in the lower-right corner drawing on paper. The human artist is seen from behind, hair in a bun, sitting at a desk near the window and working on a tablet. The studio is filled with cozy decorative details: a large framed poster on the left wall reading "The Perfect Match: Skywork x GPT-Image-2", a bookshelf packed with books and cute objects, potted plants throughout the room, framed mini art prints, wall shelves with jars and decor, hanging bunting in the upper left, a teal pendant lamp above the table, and a large window on the right with cream curtains revealing a bright garden, fence, and soft greenery outside. Use soft golden morning light, pastel colors, polished children’s-book-style rendering, clean linework, gentle shading, inviting creative atmosphere, highly detailed props, and a polished cinematic composition that feels like an uplifting promotional illustration for Skywork x GPT-Image-2.
